sources.title: Life And Nothing More 1992
sources.description: Life And Nothing More 1992 Movie by Abbas Kiarostami

metadata.Plot: Standing on the edge of adulthood, Andrew yearns to find his purpose as a young black man in today's America. With his mother longing to find more to her life than parenting, Andrew is forced to take on the mounting pressure of family responsibility. His search for connection with an absent father, leads him to a dangerous crossroads.
metadata.Actors: Andrew Bleechington, Regina Williams, Robert Williams
